user_story: Find a high-APR byreal CLMM pool, inspect its tick spacing, and preview zapping 50 USDC into a fresh position around the current price. Read-only flow against api2.byreal.io — the quote preview is the last step; no write tools, no wallet signatures.

turns.prompt: What are the top byreal CLMM pools by 24h APR right now?
Take the top USDC pool from that list and show me its current price, tick spacing, and fee rate.
Preview zapping 50 USDC into that pool in a range of about 10 tick-spacings either side of the current tick. Just the quote — do not open anything.
